description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Addressed to Abū ʿAlī. The sender says that "all the doc[tors] prescribed [...] for me... and after that they prescribed me the iṭr[īfal]...." On verso, assuming this is still the same letter, he complains of his old age and frailty (or perhaps poverty). He expresses gratitude to the addressee.
tags: illness: physicians, illness: prescription, Illness, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: שבר מכתב ביהודית-ערבית; לאבו עלי; הכותב מדווח שכל 'הד[ר']כים' רשמו לו [...] ולאחר מכן רשמו לו האיטריפל; בגב: מתלונן על זקנה וחולשה; מביע הכרת תודה
